rows.label: qev030610_MSG0001
rows.name:
Bias marry faster than any other alien species, da.
When I married Hexuna too,
we had the ceremony the day after I took a liking to her, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030610_MSG0002
rows.name:
Because what you feel at that moment is the only truth, na.
If you take too much time, you'll let
your precious partner slip away, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030610_MSG1001
rows.name:
Ha ha!
All over the place, those drunk, strength-obsessed guys
are starting fights, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030610_MSG1002
rows.name:
Yeah, rather than brooding over what the Growth are doing,
going wild and letting loose like this
is much more Bias-like, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030610_MSG2001
rows.name:
Are you enjoying the wedding?
For some reason, I've ended up remembering
the time I married Hexuna, zo... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030610_MSG2002
rows.name:
She... seemed to have a hard time with the preparations this time, so
I should do something nice for my family when I get home! [ST:wait ]
